title: Appodeal in Numbers
headline: Where We Stand Right Now
description: ~$100M gross profit. $20M EBITDA. Gaming turned profitable. 40% YoY growth projected for 2026. And we're just getting started.

title: Happy Birthday!
name: Burak Mavis
message: Another year of greatness begins! Your energy and dedication inspire everyone around you. Here's to unforgettable moments ahead.

title: Welcome to the Team!
name: Armaan Pandher
quote: University of Miami grad in AI & Data Science. Former competitive swim team captain — that discipline shapes how I work today. Outside of work, I'm into art and music. Miami's creativity inspires everything I build.

title: Welcome to the Team!
name: Andreu Margarit
quote: I'm from Capellades, about an hour from Barcelona. I enjoy the gym, football, volleyball, piano, and card games. My goal? To develop professionally while having a great time!

title: Revenue Machine
headline: Floor Optimization Model Rollout
description: Pushed stakeholders to roll out and tune the new model. Started from $800–1k/day, now showing $3.2k/day fee uplift and $14.2k/day spend uplift.
takeaway: This push is worth $2k+/day and shows how important A-Players are

title: 50× Claps — Record!
reason: For organizing BCN Data Nights at Talent Garden — bringing first-time speakers to stage and making the whole event flawless. This was YOUR vision and YOUR execution.

title: First Time on Stage!
eventName: BCN Data Nights — AI Conference @ Talent Garden
description: Gleb, Evgenia & Maksym delivered complex AI topics to a live audience for the FIRST TIME ever. Emma managed the entire operation. Mariia made it happen. The courage to step out of your comfort zone — that's how we grow.

title: AI Vision
headline: Every Employee = 5–10 AI Agents
description: Within 3–6 months, every team member will manage their own AI agents. OKR Auditor already checks 1,000+ individual OKRs daily. Daria Bot saves $4k/week analyzing app reviews. This is our future.

title: Game Metrics 🔥
headline: Infinite Minesweeper Crushes It
description: Minesweeper hit 61% retention (Apple benchmark: 88% ERA — we're at 151-160%). Solitaire v540 boosted D7 by 21.67%. Crossword ROAS exceeded 200%.
takeaway: Our games are not just fun — they're retention machines

title: Conference Heroes!
reason: Huge kudos for stepping out of your comfort zone to host and speak at the conference. Your courage truly inspires the whole team!

title: Clappy Winners — January
headline: 10 Stars Who Raised the Bar
description: Tomiris · Lidia G. · Maksym Fedorov · Ana Abuseridze · Sergio-Yersi · Antonio Clavelli · Baptiste · Emma · Sem Sinchenko · Alessandro — each with an incredible impact story.

title: Top Claps This Week
reason: Audit prep, consistent professionalism, relocation support, release 3.6.0 — recognition flows when people show up for each other!
values: We work TOGETHER to SERVE OTHERS

title: Cost Savings Win
headline: FinOps & Data Governance
description: Built new FinOps tooling and started Data Governance Alpha. Deleted unused data with near-zero impact on ML teams. Scaling up to $2.5k/day savings.

title: Daily Yoga @ 13:10
headline: From office corner to global practice
quote: Anna Kolyada started daily yoga sessions at 13:10–13:30. After Sergey Orlov suggested it, she added online streaming for remote teammates and the Polish office. One person's initiative became everyone's daily ritual.
author: Anna Kolyada

title: AI Advent Challenge
headline: 20 Days. 6 Heroes. Real AI Skills.
description: Denis Glavatskikh launched a 20-day AI engineering marathon — from first agents to MCP, RAG, and a final 'God Agent' project. Only 6 made it to the finish: Viacheslav, Gleb, Cagatay, Alexandr, ArtKip & Aleksey.

title: Creative Impact
headline: Product Workshop + Artem's Manga!
description: Baptiste, Michele, Tomiris, Tanya, Viktor, Pavel D. & Artem came together for a product workshop. Artem surprised everyone with a manga-style visualization that stole the show!
takeaway: When creativity meets product thinking, magic happens

title: Connect Groups
description: Employee-led communities on Circle — from books to leadership. This session covers Explore vs Execute mode, seasonality, and inclusion. New Gym group forming in Barcelona! React or DM Kasia to join.

articles.title: The Vibe Coding Casino
articles.desc: A thought-provoking parallel between vibe coding and casinos. Dopamine-fueled coding — what could go wrong?

articles.title: Building Products That Agents Want
articles.desc: Essential viewing: how to build products in the AI agent era.

articles.title: 4 Disciplines of Execution
articles.desc: Protect focus time from the 'whirlwind'. Max 3 key initiatives per quarter. Cap meetings at 10-12h/week.

title: Build. Ship. Improve.
headline: The new Appodeal mindset
quote: No more passive suggestions. Everyone — including non-engineers — learns Cursor + Opus 4.6 and ships pull requests. From requirements mentality to pull request mentality.
author: Pavel Golubev, CEO

title: Recent Birthdays
name: Daniyal Ahmad, Dmitry Feshchenko, Roman Rinchinov & Hanna Minko
message: Hope you all had wonderful celebrations! The team sends love and best wishes for the year ahead.

title: Fraud Destroyed
headline: From Crisis to Control
description: The team slashed fraud from 22% to under 4% with dynamic SDK signatures and advanced detection. A massive win for platform integrity.

title: Sales Pipeline on Fire
headline: 8 Deals Closed in One Week
description: The sales machine keeps delivering. 8 deals closed with $390k net revenue in a single week. On track to exceed the $13.3M target.

title: Friday Celebrations
headline: Wins & Growth Moments
prompt1: 🌱 What made you proud this week — at work, at home, or in life?
prompt2: 💡 We celebrate failures because acknowledging them creates space for improvement.
coreValue: This is how we live Relentless Pursuit of Excellence. Share your wins and lessons every Friday in #general.
